report.summary: Cycle v6: No new commits since Mar 25 batch deploy (21aaf5b). 333 uncommitted files (31 modified + 302 untracked) — up from 319 in v5. Published slugs grew to 590 with 485 page.tsx files (82.2%). 145 TS errors stable in same 6 files. All 6 API routes healthy. Deploy now 3+ days stale — remains P0.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Page coverage: 485/590 published slugs have page.tsx files (82.2%). 105 slugs still missing — same set as v5. Published-pages.ts grew by 7 slugs with matching page.tsx (net zero change to missing count).

TypeScript: 145 errors across 6 files — unchanged from v5. Same JSX syntax issues in crypto-arbitrage-strategies, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield, plus structured-data.examples.ts. No new regressions.
No new pages built or published this cycle. No .next/ build artifacts found (local build dir absent or cleaned).
Egress proxy blocks degen0x.com — cannot confirm live 200 status codes. Production presumed stable on commit 21aaf5b.
No regressions introduced since v5.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present and code-healthy: prices (118L), fear-greed (47L), trending (62L), market-metrics (150L), market-dominance (140L), defi-yields (149L).

Cache TTLs verified — fear-greed: s-maxage=600 + SWR 1200. trending: s-maxage=300 + SWR 600. market-metrics: s-maxage=60 + SWR 120. market-dominance: s-maxage=300 + SWR 600 + ISR 300. defi-yields: dynamic CACHE_DURATION + SWR 2x. prices: s-maxage=60 + SWR 120 + ISR 60.
Error handling: All 6 routes have try/catch with fallback error responses. prices and market-dominance have explicit fallback data paths. Good degradation pattern.
Rate limiter: Still 0/6 core routes protected — carry-over from Day 1.
7 additional API routes exist (health, cache-stats, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, subscribe, standup-email) — all structurally sound.
Cannot verify live API health due to egress block.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (Mar 25, 09:26 UTC+1) — 'batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes'. Now 3+ days old.
333 uncommitted files (31 modified + 302 untracked) — up from 319 in v5. Growth from automated report generation (+14 files this cycle).
Vercel project configured (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Auto-deploy on push to main. Needs git commit + push to update production.
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard or deployment logs from sandbox.
No code changes since last deploy — production should be stable on 21aaf5b.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing new — automated monitoring cycle only. Published-pages.ts grew by 7 entries (583→590) with matching page.tsx files, likely from a prior session.
DELTA FROM V5: +14 uncommitted files (319→333), all from automated report generation. Zero code changes. Published slugs 583→590 (+7). Page.tsx coverage 478→485 (+7). TS errors unchanged at 145.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (unchanged): (1) Deploy P0 — 333 uncommitted files, 3+ days pending. (2) 0/6 API rate limiting. (3) 145 TS errors in 6 files. (4) 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (5) Egress blocks live verification.

NEEDS JEFE'S ATTENTION: Git commit + push remains the single highest-leverage action. 3+ days of work (170+ pages, 62+ OG images, 30+ learn pages, UX fixes, 7 new pages) invisible to production and Google.
